data.description: Japan stocks continue gains, Nikkei +1.5% last.

data.title: Kat Florence Hotel now offers La Mer massages daily, Michelin-Origin 'Infinity Pâtisserie,' and a Nordic Winter Spa. Luxury all-inclusive stay.
data.description: A prominent luxury jeweler is elevating the concept of bespoke hospitality by introducing a new era of all-inclusive experiences. The reimagined Kat Florence Hotel in Elora, ON, combines signature precision and sophistication with ultra-luxury amenities now included as standard in every stay. The hotel, restored and redesigned by the seven-time world champion, offers a unique blend of exquisite craftsmanship and opulence. This development marks a shift towards luxury accommodation that seamlessly integrates exclusivity with unparalleled comfort and style.
PBOC cuts the $CNY Central Parity Rate by 17 pips to 7.0120 per USD, 250 pips weaker than market expectations. $USDCNY $USDCNH

Shanghai rose 6.3% on Wednesday, +5.3%, +1%, and +0.9%, +0.6%. +0.2%. Guangzhou carbonate +2.8%, and +2%. INE crude oil rose 2.5%. rebars +0.2%.

data.title: Celltrion discusses drug pipeline, U.S. expansion plans at J.P. Morgan Conf. Focus on scaling U.S. R&D, manufacturing. Strengthening global operations.
data.description: Celltrion has unveiled a plan for advancing drug development with a focus on its antibody proficiency. The company is emphasizing its strategy to enhance U.S. manufacturing and research & development capacities, aiming to bolster its worldwide supply chain, production, and operations. This announcement was made from INCHEON, South Korea on January 13.
The 20-year Japanese government bond yield climbs 2.5 basis points to 3.165%.
Record 5-year JGB yields emerge amid debt worries ahead of auction.
Shanghai tin futures surge above 5% on heavy trading.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading rejects Diana Shipping's proposal for undervaluing Genco, lacking financing, and not benefitting shareholders.
data.description: In a unanimous decision, the board has concluded that the proposal undervalues Genco significantly, with considerable execution risks and lacks committed financing, ultimately not serving the best interests of shareholders.
